overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through a sunny downtown Los Santos area. The player walks along sidewalks, crosses a busy intersection, and ascends stairs to a plaza with a fountain overlooking the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with retaining wall and street trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a concrete wall, approaching an intersection with tall buildings ahead

notable_agents.action: walking in the same direction ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tan concrete wall topped with green hedge running along the left side of the sidewalk
modern high-rise building with reflective glass facade visible in the distance
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk on the left side
modern street lamp post on the right side of the sidewalk
metal public trash receptacle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a downtown sidewalk bordered by a concrete retaining wall with hedges on the left and a multi-lane street on the right. Tall modern skyscrapers rise in the distance against a clear blue sky, with palm trees lining the street. The camera moves steadily forward approaching an intersection.

events.description: steps off the sidewalk and enters the crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
waits for vehicles to pass before continuing across the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk, navigating between waiting pedestrians and moving traffic

notable_agents.action: red convertible driving through the intersection
group of pedestrians waiting at the corner to cross

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the asphalt
large dark glass and steel office building dominating the skyline ahead
low-rise beige building with art deco styling on the corner
street food vendor cart with red and yellow striped umbrella
traffic signal pole at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection as the camera crosses the street. A prominent dark office building rises ahead while a food cart with a colorful umbrella sits on the opposite corner. Vehicles including a red convertible pass through the intersection as pedestrians wait at the corner. The camera navigates the crosswalk among other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved sidewalk with benches and landscaping

events.description: turns left onto the sidewalk after crossing the street, continuing along the curved path

agents.ego_description: walking along a curved sidewalk past park benches and newspaper stands, approaching a large building entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in purple outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: wide concrete sidewalk curving along the building front
black metal park bench on the right side of the walkway
row of red newspaper boxes on the left side
large leafy tree providing shade on the right side
large office building with BAWSAQ signage visible above the entrance

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the camera turns left onto a curved sidewalk lined with benches and mature trees. The path leads toward a large office building with visible BAWSAQ signage. A woman in purple walks ahead, and a man sits on one of the benches. The sidewalk is bordered by a grassy area with landscaping on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase leading to elevated plaza

events.description: approaches the building entrance and begins ascending the wide stone staircase
continues climbing the stairs, passing other pedestrians on the steps

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone stairs toward the building entrance, passing pedestrians sitting and standing on the steps

notable_agents.action: man sitting on the stair wall eating
woman standing on the stairs looking at phone

entered.detail: broad stone steps with concrete side walls leading up to the plaza
blue corporate sign reading PENRIS on the building facade
white corporate sign reading SCHLONGBERG SACHS on the building
water fountain spraying upward in the plaza at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the building entrance and begins ascending a grand stone staircase. Corporate signage for PENRIS and SCHLONGBERG SACHS is visible on the building facade. At the top of the stairs, a water fountain comes into view. Other pedestrians are seen sitting on the stair walls and standing on the steps.

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and pans to take in the view of the city from the elevated plaza

agents.ego_description: walking around the elevated plaza near the fountain, looking out over the city view and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: woman standing near the railing looking at her phone

entered.detail: large classical-style government building visible in the distance across the street
park benches on the left side of the plaza overlooking the street below
tiled fountain basin with water jets in the center of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches an elevated plaza featuring a prominent water fountain with jets spraying upward. The open tiled area offers views of the city hall building and streets below. A woman stands near the railing looking at her phone while the camera pans to take in the panoramic view of the downtown area from this vantage point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a street-level sidewalk through a bustling urban intersection and up to an elevated city plaza. It begins with a steady walk along a downtown sidewalk bordered by hedges and palm trees, moving toward a wide intersection where skyscrapers tower against a clear blue sky. As the camera crosses the street among pedestrians and passing vehicles, the scene shifts toward a curved, tree-lined path featuring benches and corporate signage. The movement then leads toward a grand stone staircase, ascending past corporate facades and waiting pedestrians until a water fountain comes into view at the top. Finally, the camera reaches an open tiled plaza, passing a woman on her phone to reveal a panoramic vantage point overlooking the city hall and the streets below.
